product: Grok models will soon be available as pay-per-token foundation models
tagline: Grok models will soon be available as pay per token foundation models in Databricks Model Serving.
what_it_does: Grok models will soon be available as pay per token foundation models in Databricks Model Serving. This article describes the foundation models you can serve using Model Serving. Foundation models are large, pre trained neural networks that are trained on both large and broad ranges of data.
why_it_matters: You can apply AI to your data and run batch inference production workloads at scale using these functions and their supported models.
plain_summary: Grok models will soon be available as pay per token foundation models in Databricks Model Serving. This article describes the foundation models you can serve using Model Serving.
